words.example_en: The city experienced a large influx of immigrants in the 1990s.
words.example_pt: A cidade experimentou um grande influxo de imigrantes nos anos 1990.
words.audio_script: Influx. The city experienced a large influx of immigrants.

options: B) Influxo / Entrada em grande quantidade

words.example_en: The income disparity between rich and poor continues to grow.
words.example_pt: A disparidade de renda entre ricos e pobres continua a crescer.
words.audio_script: Disparity. The income disparity continues to grow.

words.example_en: The court's decision set an important legal precedent.
words.example_pt: A decisão do tribunal estabeleceu um importante precedente legal.
words.audio_script: Precedent. The decision set an important legal precedent.

options: B) Estabelecer um exemplo que será seguido no futuro

words.example_en: Democratic values are the underpinning of modern society.
words.example_pt: Valores democráticos são a base da sociedade moderna.
words.audio_script: Underpinning. Democratic values are the underpinning of modern society.

theme: Simulado Vocabulary TOEFL — Vocabulary in context

words.example_en: The new policy aims to ameliorate living conditions in urban slums.
words.example_pt: A nova política visa melhorar as condições de vida em favelas urbanas.
words.audio_script: Ameliorate. The policy aims to ameliorate living conditions.

exercise.instruction_pt: No contexto 'measures to ameliorate the effects of poverty', 'ameliorate' significa:

words.example_en: Please include only pertinent information in your report.
words.example_pt: Por favor, inclua apenas informações pertinentes no seu relatório.
words.audio_script: Pertinent. Include only pertinent information in your report.

words.example_en: The study encompasses data from 30 countries over 20 years.
words.example_pt: O estudo abrange dados de 30 países ao longo de 20 anos.
words.audio_script: Encompass. The study encompasses data from 30 countries.

words.example_en: Students found ways to circumvent the school's internet filters.
words.example_pt: Alunos encontraram formas de contornar os filtros de internet da escola.
words.audio_script: Circumvent. Students found ways to circumvent the internet filters.

options: B) Contornar / Evitar (uma regra ou obstáculo)

words.example_en: The internet has made it easier to disseminate information globally.
words.example_pt: A internet facilitou a disseminação de informação globalmente.
words.audio_script: Disseminate. The internet makes it easier to disseminate information.

words.example_en: The country struggled to extricate itself from the economic crisis.
words.example_pt: O país lutou para se livrar da crise econômica.
words.audio_script: Extricate. The country struggled to extricate itself from the crisis.

words.example_en: The speech galvanized the public to demand change.
words.example_pt: O discurso galvanizou o público a exigir mudanças.
words.audio_script: Galvanize. The speech galvanized the public to demand change.

words.example_en: The documentary juxtaposes scenes of poverty with images of extreme wealth.
words.example_pt: O documentário justapõe cenas de pobreza com imagens de riqueza extrema.
words.audio_script: Juxtapose. The documentary juxtaposes poverty with extreme wealth.

options: B) Colocar lado a lado para comparar/contrastar

words.example_en: She is the quintessential example of a dedicated researcher.
words.example_pt: Ela é o exemplo quintessencial de uma pesquisadora dedicada.
words.audio_script: Quintessential. She is the quintessential example of a dedicated researcher.

options: B) O exemplo mais perfeito/típico de algo

words.example_en: The invention of the printing press was a watershed moment in human history.
words.example_pt: A invenção da prensa foi um momento divisor de águas na história humana.
words.audio_script: Watershed. The printing press was a watershed moment in history.

options: B) Momento decisivo / Divisor de águas

theme: Vocabulário TOEFL — Palavras de transição e análise

words.example_en: Developed countries have low birth rates. Conversely, developing nations have high birth rates.
words.example_pt: Países desenvolvidos têm baixas taxas de natalidade. Inversamente, nações em desenvolvimento têm altas taxas.
words.audio_script: Conversely. Developed countries have low birth rates. Conversely, developing nations have high birth rates.

words.example_en: The new law increased penalties, thereby reducing crime rates.
words.example_pt: A nova lei aumentou as penalidades, assim reduzindo as taxas de criminalidade.
words.audio_script: Thereby. The new law increased penalties, thereby reducing crime rates.

words.example_en: The theory is valid insofar as it explains the observed data.
words.example_pt: A teoria é válida na medida em que explica os dados observados.
words.audio_script: Insofar as. The theory is valid insofar as it explains the observed data.

options: B) Na medida em que / Até o ponto em que

words.example_en: The study revealed hitherto unknown mechanisms of disease transmission.
words.example_pt: O estudo revelou mecanismos de transmissão de doenças até então desconhecidos.
words.audio_script: Hitherto. The study revealed hitherto unknown mechanisms.

words.example_en: The country's performance vis-à-vis its neighbors has been disappointing.
words.example_pt: O desempenho do país em relação aos vizinhos tem sido decepcionante.
words.audio_script: Vis-à-vis. The country's performance vis-à-vis its neighbors has been disappointing.

options: B) Em relação a / Comparado com

words.example_en: Refusing to act is tantamount to supporting the status quo.
words.example_pt: Recusar-se a agir é equivalente a apoiar o status quo.
words.audio_script: Tantamount. Refusing to act is tantamount to supporting the status quo.

words.example_en: The entire argument is predicated on the assumption that economic growth is always desirable.
words.example_pt: Todo o argumento é baseado na suposição de que crescimento econômico é sempre desejável.
words.audio_script: Predicate. The argument is predicated on the assumption of growth.

words.example_en: Digital media has largely supplanted print newspapers.
words.example_pt: Mídia digital amplamente suplantou jornais impressos.
words.audio_script: Supplant. Digital media has largely supplanted print newspapers.

words.example_en: The author eschews sensationalism in favor of measured analysis.
words.example_pt: O autor evita sensacionalismo em favor de análise comedida.
words.audio_script: Eschew. The author eschews sensationalism in favor of measured analysis.

words.example_en: The new technology could obviate the need for invasive surgery.
words.example_pt: A nova tecnologia poderia eliminar a necessidade de cirurgia invasiva.
words.audio_script: Obviate. The new technology could obviate the need for invasive surgery.

options: B) Tornar desnecessário / Eliminar a necessidade

theme: Vocabulário TOEFL — Adjetivos e advérbios de precisão acadêmica

words.example_en: The ostensible reason for the meeting was to discuss budgets, but the real purpose was to announce layoffs.
words.example_pt: O motivo ostensivo da reunião era discutir orçamentos, mas o propósito real era anunciar demissões.
words.audio_script: Ostensible. The ostensible reason was to discuss budgets.

options: A) A razão é a verdadeira
B) A razão aparente pode não ser a real

words.example_en: There was a tacit agreement among the researchers not to publish preliminary data.
words.example_pt: Havia um acordo tácito entre os pesquisadores de não publicar dados preliminares.
words.audio_script: Tacit. There was a tacit agreement not to publish preliminary data.

words.example_en: The correlation between ice cream sales and drowning deaths is spurious — both are caused by hot weather.
words.example_pt: A correlação entre vendas de sorvete e afogamentos é espúria — ambos são causados pelo calor.
words.audio_script: Spurious. The correlation is spurious — both are caused by hot weather.

options: B) Correlação espúria / falsa (causada por variável oculta)

words.example_en: The salary should be commensurate with the level of experience.
words.example_pt: O salário deve ser proporcional ao nível de experiência.
words.audio_script: Commensurate. The salary should be commensurate with experience.

words.example_en: The nascent field of quantum computing holds enormous potential.
words.example_pt: O campo nascente da computação quântica tem enorme potencial.
words.audio_script: Nascent. The nascent field of quantum computing holds enormous potential.

options: B) Nascente / No início de desenvolvimento

words.example_en: Darwin's 'On the Origin of Species' is a seminal work in biology.
words.example_pt: 'A Origem das Espécies' de Darwin é uma obra seminal na biologia.
words.audio_script: Seminal. Darwin's work is a seminal text in biology.

options: B) Obra fundamental que influenciou todo um campo

words.example_en: The war left an indelible mark on the national psyche.
words.example_pt: A guerra deixou uma marca indelével na psique nacional.
words.audio_script: Indelible. The war left an indelible mark on the national psyche.

options: B) Indelével / Permanente / Impossível de apagar

words.example_en: Economic development and environmental protection are inextricably linked.
words.example_pt: Desenvolvimento econômico e proteção ambiental estão inextricavelmente ligados.
words.audio_script: Inextricably. Economic development and environment are inextricably linked.

words.example_en: Orwell's '1984' was remarkably prescient about surveillance technology.
words.example_pt: '1984' de Orwell foi notavelmente presciente sobre tecnologia de vigilância.
words.audio_script: Prescient. Orwell's 1984 was remarkably prescient about surveillance.

options: B) Presciente / Que previu corretamente o futuro

words.example_en: It is axiomatic that education improves economic outcomes.
words.example_pt: É axiomático que educação melhora resultados econômicos.
words.audio_script: Axiomatic. It is axiomatic that education improves outcomes.

options: B) Axiomático / Evidente por si mesmo / Aceito como verdade

theme: Vocabulário TOEFL — Verbos de mudança e transformação

words.example_en: Public trust in institutions has been steadily eroding.
words.example_pt: A confiança pública nas instituições tem erodido constantemente.
words.audio_script: Erode. Public trust in institutions has been steadily eroding.

words.example_en: The financial crisis was precipitated by the collapse of the housing market.
words.example_pt: A crise financeira foi precipitada pelo colapso do mercado imobiliário.
words.audio_script: Precipitate. The crisis was precipitated by the housing collapse.

words.example_en: Stereotypes perpetuate inequality by reinforcing false beliefs.
words.example_pt: Estereótipos perpetuam desigualdade ao reforçar crenças falsas.
words.audio_script: Perpetuate. Stereotypes perpetuate inequality.

words.example_en: The pandemic catalyzed the adoption of remote work technology.
words.example_pt: A pandemia catalisou a adoção de tecnologia de trabalho remoto.
words.audio_script: Catalyze. The pandemic catalyzed the adoption of remote work.

words.example_en: AI will augment human capabilities rather than replace them.
words.example_pt: IA vai ampliar capacidades humanas em vez de substituí-las.
words.audio_script: Augment. AI will augment human capabilities rather than replace them.

words.example_en: The drug attenuates the symptoms but does not cure the disease.
words.example_pt: O medicamento atenua os sintomas mas não cura a doença.
words.audio_script: Attenuate. The drug attenuates the symptoms but does not cure the disease.

words.example_en: The company consolidated its position as the market leader.
words.example_pt: A empresa consolidou sua posição como líder de mercado.
words.audio_script: Consolidate. The company consolidated its position as market leader.

words.example_en: Misinformation proliferates rapidly on social media platforms.
words.example_pt: Desinformação prolifera rapidamente em plataformas de redes sociais.
words.audio_script: Proliferate. Misinformation proliferates rapidly on social media.

words.example_en: Great art transcends cultural and temporal boundaries.
words.example_pt: Grande arte transcende fronteiras culturais e temporais.
words.audio_script: Transcend. Great art transcends cultural and temporal boundaries.

words.example_en: Evidence-based practice underpins modern medical education.
words.example_pt: Prática baseada em evidências sustenta a educação médica moderna.
words.audio_script: Underpin. Evidence-based practice underpins modern medical education.

theme: Vocabulário TOEFL — Palavras de escala e proporção

words.example_en: The growth of data has been exponential over the past decade.
words.example_pt: O crescimento de dados tem sido exponencial na última década.
words.audio_script: Exponential. Data growth has been exponential over the past decade.

options: B) Crescimento que acelera cada vez mais rápido

words.example_en: The difference between the two groups was negligible.
words.example_pt: A diferença entre os dois grupos era negligenciável.
words.audio_script: Negligible. The difference between the groups was negligible.

options: B) Negligenciável / Tão pequeno que pode ser ignorado

words.example_en: The probability of this event is minuscule.
words.example_pt: A probabilidade deste evento é minúscula.
words.audio_script: Minuscule. The probability of this event is minuscule.

words.example_en: The cost of healthcare in the US is astronomical compared to other countries.
words.example_pt: O custo de saúde nos EUA é astronômico comparado a outros países.
words.audio_script: Astronomical. Healthcare costs in the US are astronomical.

words.example_en: The improvement was marginal — only 2% better than the control group.
words.example_pt: A melhora foi marginal — apenas 2% melhor que o grupo controle.
words.audio_script: Marginal. The improvement was marginal — only 2% better.

words.example_en: Low-income communities bear a disproportionate burden of pollution.
words.example_pt: Comunidades de baixa renda suportam um ônus desproporcional de poluição.
words.audio_script: Disproportionate. Low-income communities bear a disproportionate burden.

options: B) Desproporcional / Muito maior ou menor do que deveria

words.example_en: Racial bias is pervasive in many institutional systems.
words.example_pt: Viés racial é generalizado em muitos sistemas institucionais.
words.audio_script: Pervasive. Racial bias is pervasive in institutional systems.

words.example_en: The discovery had profound implications for our understanding of the universe.
words.example_pt: A descoberta teve implicações profundas para nosso entendimento do universo.
words.audio_script: Profound. The discovery had profound implications.

words.example_en: Progress has been incremental rather than revolutionary.
words.example_pt: O progresso tem sido incremental em vez de revolucionário.
words.audio_script: Incremental. Progress has been incremental rather than revolutionary.

words.example_en: The benefits of education are manifold.
words.example_pt: Os benefícios da educação são múltiplos.
words.audio_script: Manifold. The benefits of education are manifold.

options: B) Múltiplo / Variado / De muitas formas

theme: Simulado Vocabulary TOEFL — Vocabulary in context avançado

words.example_en: Many gig workers face precarious employment with no job security.
words.example_pt: Muitos trabalhadores de gig enfrentam emprego precário sem segurança no trabalho.
words.audio_script: Precarious. Many gig workers face precarious employment.

exercise.instruction_pt: No contexto 'The ecosystem is in a precarious state', 'precarious' significa:

words.example_en: Attempts to negotiate were futile — the other side refused to compromise.
words.example_pt: Tentativas de negociar foram fúteis — o outro lado se recusou a ceder.
words.audio_script: Futile. Attempts to negotiate were futile.

words.example_en: Chomsky argued that the capacity for language is innate in humans.
words.example_pt: Chomsky argumentou que a capacidade para linguagem é inata nos humanos.
words.audio_script: Innate. The capacity for language is innate in humans.

words.example_en: The Fermi Paradox asks why we haven't found alien life despite high probability.
words.example_pt: O Paradoxo de Fermi pergunta por que não encontramos vida alienígena apesar da alta probabilidade.
words.audio_script: Paradox. The Fermi Paradox asks why we haven't found alien life.

options: B) Uma contradição aparente que desafia a lógica

words.example_en: The relationship between teacher and student should be reciprocal.
words.example_pt: A relação entre professor e aluno deve ser recíproca.
words.audio_script: Reciprocal. The teacher-student relationship should be reciprocal.

words.example_en: The relationship between clownfish and sea anemones is symbiotic.
words.example_pt: A relação entre peixes-palhaço e anêmonas do mar é simbiótica.
words.audio_script: Symbiotic. The clownfish-anemone relationship is symbiotic.

words.example_en: The political situation in the region remains volatile.
words.example_pt: A situação política na região permanece volátil.
words.audio_script: Volatile. The political situation remains volatile.

words.example_en: The juxtaposition of extreme wealth and poverty in the city is stark.
words.example_pt: A justaposição de extrema riqueza e pobreza na cidade é gritante.
words.audio_script: Juxtaposition. The juxtaposition of wealth and poverty is stark.

options: B) Contraste forte e evidente lado a lado

words.example_en: Corruption is endemic in many political systems.
words.example_pt: Corrupção é endêmica em muitos sistemas políticos.
words.audio_script: Endemic. Corruption is endemic in many political systems.

options: B) Endêmico / Presente de forma generalizada e persistente

words.example_en: The invention of the internet was a watershed moment in human communication.
words.example_pt: A invenção da internet foi um momento divisor de águas na comunicação humana.
words.audio_script: Watershed. The internet was a watershed moment in communication.

options: B) Momento decisivo que marca uma mudança fundamental

theme: Vocabulário TOEFL — Palavras de causalidade e relação

words.example_en: Experts attribute the decline in crime to better policing and economic growth.
words.example_pt: Especialistas atribuem a queda no crime a melhor policiamento e crescimento econômico.
words.audio_script: Attribute. Experts attribute the decline in crime to better policing.

options: A) Negar a causa de X
B) Atribuir X a Y / Dizer que Y causou X
C) Atacar Y por causa de X

words.example_en: The proposed reforms would entail significant changes to the tax system.
words.example_pt: As reformas propostas acarretariam mudanças significativas no sistema tributário.
words.audio_script: Entail. The proposed reforms would entail significant changes.

words.example_en: The severity of the problem warrants immediate government action.
words.example_pt: A gravidade do problema justifica ação governamental imediata.
words.audio_script: Warrant. The severity of the problem warrants immediate action.

words.example_en: Genetic factors may predispose certain individuals to heart disease.
words.example_pt: Fatores genéticos podem predispor certos indivíduos a doenças cardíacas.
words.audio_script: Predispose. Genetic factors may predispose individuals to heart disease.

options: B) Predispor / Tornar mais susceptível a

words.example_en: Income level correlates strongly with educational attainment.
words.example_pt: Nível de renda correlaciona-se fortemente com nível educacional.
words.audio_script: Correlate. Income level correlates strongly with educational attainment.

options: B) Ter relação estatística com (sem implicar causação)

words.example_en: Bureaucratic regulations impede economic growth in many countries.
words.example_pt: Regulações burocráticas impedem crescimento econômico em muitos países.
words.audio_script: Impede. Bureaucratic regulations impede economic growth.

words.example_en: Social media exerts a powerful influence on public opinion.
words.example_pt: Redes sociais exercem uma influência poderosa na opinião pública.
words.audio_script: Exert. Social media exerts a powerful influence on public opinion.

words.example_en: The policy engendered widespread public debate.
words.example_pt: A política gerou amplo debate público.
words.audio_script: Engender. The policy engendered widespread public debate.

words.example_en: Uncontrolled variables can confound the results of an experiment.
words.example_pt: Variáveis não controladas podem confundir os resultados de um experimento.
words.audio_script: Confound. Uncontrolled variables can confound experimental results.

options: B) Variável que distorce resultados por não ter sido controlada

words.example_en: Personal beliefs should not impinge on professional decision-making.
words.example_pt: Crenças pessoais não devem afetar a tomada de decisão profissional.
words.audio_script: Impinge. Personal beliefs should not impinge on professional decisions.

theme: Vocabulário TOEFL — Palavras de avaliação e julgamento

words.example_en: The research was recognized as particularly meritorious by the committee.
words.example_pt: A pesquisa foi reconhecida como particularmente meritória pelo comitê.
words.audio_script: Meritorious. The research was recognized as particularly meritorious.

words.example_en: The methodology of the study is dubious at best.
words.example_pt: A metodologia do estudo é duvidosa na melhor das hipóteses.
words.audio_script: Dubious. The methodology of the study is dubious at best.

words.example_en: While the initiative is laudable, its implementation has been problematic.
words.example_pt: Embora a iniciativa seja louvável, sua implementação tem sido problemática.
words.audio_script: Laudable. While the initiative is laudable, its implementation has been problematic.

words.example_en: The hypothesis became untenable after the replication study failed.
words.example_pt: A hipótese tornou-se insustentável após o estudo de replicação falhar.
words.audio_script: Untenable. The hypothesis became untenable after replication failed.

words.example_en: She presented a cogent argument supported by extensive evidence.
words.example_pt: Ela apresentou um argumento convincente apoiado por evidência extensa.
words.audio_script: Cogent. She presented a cogent argument supported by evidence.

words.example_en: The argument is specious — it sounds logical but is based on flawed premises.
words.example_pt: O argumento é especioso — parece lógico mas é baseado em premissas falhas.
words.audio_script: Specious. The argument sounds logical but is based on flawed premises.

options: B) Aparentemente correto mas na verdade falso

words.example_en: A judicious use of resources is essential during economic downturns.
words.example_pt: Um uso judicioso de recursos é essencial durante recessões econômicas.
words.audio_script: Judicious. A judicious use of resources is essential during downturns.

words.example_en: The decision was politically expedient but ethically questionable.
words.example_pt: A decisão foi politicamente conveniente mas eticamente questionável.
words.audio_script: Expedient. The decision was politically expedient but ethically questionable.

options: B) Conveniente/prático no momento mas possivelmente problemático eticamente

words.example_en: The selection criteria appeared arbitrary and lacking transparency.
words.example_pt: Os critérios de seleção pareciam arbitrários e sem transparência.
words.audio_script: Arbitrary. The selection criteria appeared arbitrary.

options: B) Arbitrário / Baseado em vontade pessoal, não em razão

words.example_en: An equitable distribution of resources is essential for social cohesion.
words.example_pt: Uma distribuição equitativa de recursos é essencial para coesão social.
words.audio_script: Equitable. An equitable distribution of resources is essential.

options: B) Equal = mesma quantidade para todos; Equitable = distribuição justa baseada em necessidade

theme: Vocabulário TOEFL — Palavras de estrutura e organização

words.example_en: The report delineates the responsibilities of each department.
words.example_pt: O relatório delineia as responsabilidades de cada departamento.
words.audio_script: Delineate. The report delineates the responsibilities of each department.

options: B) Delinear / Definir claramente limites e fronteiras

words.example_en: The constitution codifies the fundamental rights of citizens.
words.example_pt: A constituição codifica os direitos fundamentais dos cidadãos.
words.audio_script: Codify. The constitution codifies the fundamental rights of citizens.

words.example_en: Society is stratified along lines of class, race, and gender.
words.example_pt: A sociedade é estratificada ao longo de linhas de classe, raça e gênero.
words.audio_script: Stratify. Society is stratified along lines of class, race, and gender.

words.example_en: Traditional education compartmentalizes knowledge into separate subjects.
words.example_pt: A educação tradicional compartimentaliza conhecimento em disciplinas separadas.
words.audio_script: Compartmentalize. Traditional education compartmentalizes knowledge.

words.example_en: The article conflates correlation with causation — a common logical error.
words.example_pt: O artigo confunde correlação com causação — um erro lógico comum.
words.audio_script: Conflate. The article conflates correlation with causation.

options: B) Confundir/Mesclar duas coisas diferentes como se fossem iguais

words.example_en: The study clearly demarcates the boundary between normal variation and pathology.
words.example_pt: O estudo demarca claramente a fronteira entre variação normal e patologia.
words.audio_script: Demarcate. The study demarcates the boundary between normal and pathological.

words.example_en: The debate has bifurcated into two opposing camps.
words.example_pt: O debate se bifurcou em dois campos opostos.
words.audio_script: Bifurcate. The debate has bifurcated into two opposing camps.

words.example_en: The new framework subsumes several previously distinct theories.
words.example_pt: O novo quadro teórico engloba várias teorias anteriormente distintas.
words.audio_script: Subsume. The new framework subsumes several distinct theories.

options: B) Incluir/Englobar sob categoria mais ampla

words.example_en: The essay juxtaposes traditional and modern approaches to education.
words.example_pt: O ensaio justapõe abordagens tradicionais e modernas de educação.
words.audio_script: Juxtapose. The essay juxtaposes traditional and modern approaches.

options: D) Todos os acima — juxtapose é a versão mais sofisticada

words.example_en: It is dangerous to extrapolate from a single case study to the general population.
words.example_pt: É perigoso extrapolar de um estudo de caso único para a população geral.
words.audio_script: Extrapolate. It is dangerous to extrapolate from a single case study.

options: B) Inferir além dos dados disponíveis / Generalizar

theme: Vocabulário TOEFL — Palavras frequentes em lectures

words.example_en: The professor elucidated the complex relationship between genes and environment.
words.example_pt: O professor elucidou a relação complexa entre genes e ambiente.
words.audio_script: Elucidate. The professor elucidated the complex relationship.

exercise.instruction_pt: No TOEFL, quando o professor diz 'Let me elucidate this point', ele vai:
options: B) Explicar/Esclarecer o ponto com mais detalhes

words.example_en: I'm going to digress for a moment to give you some historical context.
words.example_pt: Vou divagar por um momento para dar contexto histórico.
words.audio_script: Digress. I'm going to digress for a moment to give context.

exercise.instruction_pt: Quando o professor diz 'But I digress', isso significa:
options: A) Ele está voltando ao tópico principal
B) Ele reconhece que saiu do assunto e está voltando

words.example_en: I want to reiterate the importance of submitting your assignments on time.
words.example_pt: Quero reiterar a importância de entregar trabalhos no prazo.
words.audio_script: Reiterate. I want to reiterate the importance of timely submissions.

exercise.instruction_pt: 'Let me reiterate' no TOEFL indica que:
options: A) O professor vai apresentar algo novo
B) O professor vai REPETIR algo importante que já disse
C) O professor vai fazer uma pergunta

words.example_en: Today we'll juxtapose two competing theories to see how they differ.
words.example_pt: Hoje vamos justapor duas teorias concorrentes para ver como diferem.
words.audio_script: Juxtapose. We'll juxtapose two competing theories.

exercise.instruction_pt: Quando o professor diz 'Let's juxtapose these two theories', espere:
options: A) Uma comparação lado a lado das diferenças
C) Uma pergunta para a turma

words.example_en: Let me recapitulate the main points before we move on.
words.example_pt: Deixe-me recapitular os pontos principais antes de avançar.
words.audio_script: Recapitulate. Let me recapitulate the main points.

exercise.instruction_pt: 'To recapitulate' no final de uma lecture indica:
options: B) Um resumo dos pontos principais

words.example_en: The professor alluded to a recent scandal without naming it directly.
words.example_pt: O professor aludiu a um escândalo recente sem nomeá-lo diretamente.
words.audio_script: Allude. The professor alluded to a recent scandal.

words.example_en: I want to underscore that this is not a minor issue.
words.example_pt: Quero enfatizar que esta não é uma questão menor.
words.audio_script: Underscore. I want to underscore that this is not a minor issue.

exercise.instruction_pt: 'I want to underscore' indica que o professor vai:

words.example_en: Could you elaborate on that point? I'm not sure I understand.
words.example_pt: Poderia elaborar esse ponto? Não tenho certeza se entendi.
words.audio_script: Elaborate. Could you elaborate on that point?

options: A) O professor vai dar MAIS detalhes sobre algo
C) O professor vai mudar de assunto

words.example_en: Some theorists posit that consciousness is a fundamental property of the universe.
words.example_pt: Alguns teóricos postulam que consciência é uma propriedade fundamental do universo.
words.audio_script: Posit. Some theorists posit that consciousness is fundamental.

exercise.instruction_pt: 'The theory posits that...' é equivalente a:

words.example_en: Before we proceed, I should mention one important caveat about these findings.
words.example_pt: Antes de prosseguir, devo mencionar uma ressalva importante sobre estes achados.
words.audio_script: Caveat. I should mention one important caveat about these findings.

exercise.instruction_pt: Quando o professor diz 'with the caveat that...', espere:
options: B) Uma LIMITAÇÃO ou condição que qualifica a afirmação anterior

theme: SIMULADO FINAL — Vocabulary TOEFL nível máximo

words.example_en: The digital revolution represents a paradigm shift in how we communicate.
words.example_pt: A revolução digital representa uma mudança de paradigma em como nos comunicamos.
words.audio_script: Paradigm. The digital revolution represents a paradigm shift.

exercise.instruction_pt: SIMULADO: 'The study challenged the prevailing paradigm.' 'Paradigm' aqui significa:

words.example_en: The pandemic caused an unprecedented disruption to global education.
words.example_pt: A pandemia causou uma disrupção sem precedentes na educação global.
words.audio_script: Unprecedented. The pandemic caused unprecedented disruption.

words.example_en: A nuanced understanding of this issue requires examining multiple perspectives.
words.example_pt: Um entendimento nuançado desta questão requer examinar múltiplas perspectivas.
words.audio_script: Nuanced. A nuanced understanding requires examining multiple perspectives.

words.example_en: Effective policies can mitigate the worst effects of economic recession.
words.example_pt: Políticas eficazes podem mitigar os piores efeitos de recessão econômica.
words.audio_script: Mitigate. Effective policies can mitigate the worst effects of recession.

options: B) Mitigate = reduzir/amenizar; Eliminate = remover completamente

words.example_en: Social media can exacerbate mental health problems in vulnerable populations.
words.example_pt: Redes sociais podem exacerbar problemas de saúde mental em populações vulneráveis.
words.audio_script: Exacerbate. Social media can exacerbate mental health problems.

words.example_en: Multiple independent studies corroborate these findings.
words.example_pt: Múltiplos estudos independentes corroboram estes achados.
words.audio_script: Corroborate. Multiple independent studies corroborate these findings.

exercise.instruction_pt: SIMULADO: 'Evidence that corroborates a hypothesis' ___ it.

words.example_en: Misinformation proliferates rapidly in the absence of media literacy education.
words.example_pt: Desinformação prolifera rapidamente na ausência de educação midiática.
words.audio_script: Proliferate. Misinformation proliferates rapidly without media literacy.

exercise.instruction_pt: SIMULADO: Complete: 'The _____ of fake news has undermined public trust.'

words.example_en: The juxtaposition of ancient traditions and modern technology defines contemporary Japan.
words.example_pt: A justaposição de tradições antigas e tecnologia moderna define o Japão contemporâneo.
words.audio_script: Juxtaposition. The juxtaposition of tradition and technology defines Japan.

exercise.instruction_pt: SIMULADO: 'The juxtaposition of X and Y' é usado para:
options: A) Mostrar que X e Y são idênticos
B) Colocar X e Y lado a lado para destacar contrastes ou semelhanças
C) Provar que X é melhor que Y
D) Separar X de Y permanentemente

words.example_en: The discovery of antibiotics was a watershed moment in the history of medicine.
words.example_pt: A descoberta dos antibióticos foi um momento divisor de águas na história da medicina.
words.audio_script: Watershed. The discovery of antibiotics was a watershed moment in medicine.

exercise.instruction_pt: SIMULADO FINAL: 'Watershed moment' é sinônimo de:

words.example_en: This case study is the quintessential example of how policy failure leads to social harm.
words.example_pt: Este estudo de caso é o exemplo quintessencial de como falha de política leva a dano social.
words.audio_script: Quintessential. This is the quintessential example of policy failure.

options: B) O exemplo MAIS típico e perfeito de algo
